title: Jess Allashane

'''Jess Allashane''' was a veteran [[Rebel trooper/Legends|soldier]] of the [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|Alliance Special Forces]] during the height of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Trained to counter [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] tactics in [[Temperature/Legends|cold]]-weather environments, Allashane was assigned to protect the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance's]] secret [[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]] [[Alliance High Command/Legends|headquarters]] on the remote [[Water/Legends|ice]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]]. In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], Allashane fought to defend Echo Base against the Empire's planetary assault during the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]].

==Biography==
Jess Allashane was a veteran [[Rebel trooper/Legends|soldier]] of the revolutionary [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]<ref name="CSWE" /> in its struggle to defeat the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="CSWE-Alliance">{{CSWECite|I|20|Alliance to Restore the Republic}}</ref> Allashane was among<ref name="Hoth Limited" /> a full complement of 1,000 [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|Alliance Special Forces]] [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]] assigned to protect [[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]],<ref name="GG3 note">[[Galaxy Guide 3: The Empire Strikes Back (Second Edition)|''Galaxy Guide 3: The Empire Strikes Back'', Second Edition]] states that the [[Rebel trooper/Legends|Rebel soldiers]] assigned to protect [[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]] comprised 1,000 [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|Special Forces]] [[Troop/Legends|troops]], who were weeded down to five [[Company/Legends|companies]] to serve under [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Ledick Firest/Legends|Ledick Firest]] during the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]].</ref> the Rebellion's secret [[Alliance High Command/Legends|High Command]] headquarters on the remote [[Water/Legends|ice]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]].<ref name="GG3">[[Galaxy Guide 3: The Empire Strikes Back (Second Edition)|''Galaxy Guide 3: The Empire Strikes Back'', Second Edition]]</ref>

In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]] to [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]].</ref> the Empire discovered Echo Base and launched a full-scale invasion of the Rebel forces on Hoth.<ref name="GG3" /> The Rebel [[Evac Rearguard Action 101|battle strategy]] called for the base's [[Special forces/Legends|Special Forces]] soldiers to be broken down into five [[Company/Legends|companies]], under the leadership of [[Field Commander/Legends|field commander]] [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Ledick Firest/Legends|Ledick Firest]],<ref name="GG3 note" /> to stall the Imperial invasion [[Blizzard Force/Legends|force]] long enough for base personnel and equipment to evacuate the planet.<ref name="GG3" /> Allashane fought in the Rebels' defensive ice trenches against Imperial [[Walker/Legends|walkers]] and [[Cold assault stormtrooper|snowtroopers]] during the ensuing [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]],<ref name="Hasbro" /> which culminated in a tremendous Rebel defeat.<ref name="GG3" />

==Personality and traits==
Jess Allashane was a veteran warrior of the Rebel Alliance's cause. Serving at the Rebellion's Echo Base ice facility, Allashane was trained to counter Imperial tactics in [[Temperature/Legends|cold]]-weather environments.<ref name="CSWE" /> A [[Human/Legends|Human]], Allashane had dark [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] and light skin.<ref name="Hasbro" />

==Equipment==
Allashane wore the standard [[Alliance Cold Weather armor|cold-weather armor]] of the Rebel Echo Base field [[Troop/Legends|troops]] while on Hoth, including [[Alliance Cold Weather Headgear|headgear]], [[Anti-glare goggles/Legends|anti-glare goggles]], [[Scarf/Legends|scarf]], padded vest, [[thermal flak jacket]], gloves, belt, leggings,<ref name="Character Encyclopedia">''[[Star Wars Character Encyclopedia]]'' {{C|"Hoth Rebel Trooper"}}</ref> boots, and [[Alliance Cold Weather Backpack/Legends|backpack]].<ref name="Hasbro" /> Allashane's equipment included [[Binoculars/Legends|binoculars]],<ref name="Character Encyclopedia" /> and was armed with an [[A295 blaster rifle/Legends|A295 blaster rifle]]<ref name="A295">Jess Allashane's [[Blaster rifle/Legends|blaster rifle]], as depicted by {{HasbroCite|set=Star Wars (Hasbro toy line)|packtype='04 Basic Figure|pack=#01: Hoth Trooper (Hoth Evacuation)|altlink=https://www.rebelscum.com/sw0401hothtrooper.asp}}, visually corresponds to the [[A295 blaster rifle/Legends|A295 blaster rifle]], according to {{CCG|set=Special Edition Limited|cardname=Echo Base Trooper Rifle}}</ref> and a [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]] sidearm, the latter being [[Holster/Legends|holstered]] at the right hip.<ref name="Character Encyclopedia" />

==Behind the scenes==
The character of Jess Allashane was created for the [http://www.starwarsccg.org/cardlists/images/starwars/Hoth-Light/large/echobasetrooper.gif "Echo Base Trooper" card] as part of the [[November]] [[1996]] ''[[Hoth Limited]]'' expansion set of the [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]]. The ''Hoth Limited'' set linked Allashane with a production photo of a Hoth Rebel soldier extra from the [[1980]] film [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''Star Wars'': Episode V ''The Empire Strikes Back'']].<ref name="Hoth Limited" /> However, it is unclear whether the extra—and, by extension, Allashane—appears on-screen in the film.

Many in the online ''[[Star Wars]]'' fan community have credited [[Wikipedia:Americans|American]] actor [[Treat Williams]] with Allashane's portrayal.<ref name="IGN">{{WebCite|url=http://www.ign.com/articles/2010/05/21/100-things-you-didnt-know-about-the-empire-strikes-back?page=2|text=100 Things You Didn't Know About The Empire Strikes Back|author=Phil Pirrello, [[Eric Moro]] & Scott Collura|date=2010-05-21|work=[[Wikipedia:IGN|IGN]]|quote=Not only was Treat Williams uncredited for his participation in the 1980 ''Star Wars'' sequel (you won't find his name anywhere in the credits), but the actor actually played '''two''' bit parts in the film: Echo Base trooper Jess Allashane and Cloud City trooper Jerrol Blendin.|archivedate=20170922183816}}</ref><ref name="CUSWE">{{WebCite|url=http://www.cuswe.org/arclist.asp?search=T|text=The Completely Unofficial Star Wars Encyclopedia - Version 12.0|author=Bob Vitas|work=The Completely Unofficial Star Wars Encyclopedia|quote='''Treat Williams''' This performer portrayed Jess Allashane and Jerrol Blendin in ''Star Wars: Episode V - The Empire Strikes Back''.|archivedate=20110720010822}} {{C|content removed}}</ref><ref name="TV.com">{{TVcom|url=people/treat-williams/trivia|text=Treat Williams Trivia & Quotes}} {{C|Treat Williams appeared in: ''Star Wars: Episode V - The Empire Strikes Back'', in 1980, as Jess Allashane (Echo Base trooper) / Jerrol Blendin (Cloud City trooper). His roles were uncredited.}}</ref><ref name="Planet Dagobah">{{WebCite|url=http://planetdagobah.com/autographclassitrilogy.htm|text=Autograph Classic Trilogy|date=2017-09-15|work=[http://planetdagobah.com JMY'S PLANET DAGOBAH]|quote=Treat Williams: Jess Allashane (Echo Base Trooper) (ESB); Jeroen Webb (ESB); Jerrol Blendin (Cloud City Trooper) (ESB)|archivedate=20170922185421}}</ref><ref name="Star Wars Universe">{{WebCite|url=http://www.starwars-universe.com/casting-327-treat-richard-williams.html|text=Treat Richard Williams|date=2017|work=[http://www.starwars-universe.com Star Wars Universe]|language=French|quote=L'Empire contre-attaque : Jess Allashane / Jerrol Blendin / Jeroen Webb|archivedate=20170922190111}}</ref><ref name="Trilogy Autographs">{{WebCite|url=http://www.starwarsautographcollecting.com/Autographs/StarWarsTrilogy/ESB/TreatWilliams.htm|text=Trilogy Autographs|work=[http://starwarsautographcollecting.com Dahoov's Autograph Collecting]|quote=Treat Williams signed index card; obtained through the mail. Unsigned photos are of his characters: Top: Jerrol Blendin and second: Jess Allashane those were his characters in ''Star Wars: Empire Strikes Back''.|archivedate=20170922190301}}</ref><ref name="I Have a Bad Feeling About This">{{WebCite|url=http://www.geocities.ws/karloff3/Autograph/treat_williams.htm|text=Star Wars Autograph Successes - Treat Williams|author=karloff3|work=[http://www.geocities.ws/karloff3 I Have a Bad Feeling About This]|quote=Treat Williams Jeroen Webb; Treat Williams Jerrol Blendin|archivedate=20170922190932}}</ref> Williams visited [[Wikipedia:England|England's]] [[Elstree Studios]] during the [[1979]] filming of ''The Empire Strikes Back''<ref name="Harrison Ford: The Films">{{BookCite|author=Duke, Brad|container=Devil of a Time|title=Harrison Ford: The Films|publisher=McFarland & Company, Inc., Publishers|date=2005}} "Ford had befriended Williams at England's Elstree Studios during the 1979 production of ''The Empire Strikes Back'' — where Treat had managed to make his way onto the exclusive set, and was in tan fatigues to portray a rebel officer."</ref> and was photographed in-costume on the Echo Base set with actress [[Carrie Fisher]], who played [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]]. However, the film's external Hoth scenes,<ref name="The Making of The Empire Strikes Back - 162">''[[The Making of The Empire Strikes Back]]''</ref> which include the Allashane character production photo,<ref name="Hoth Limited" /> were shot in [[Finse]], [[Wikipedia:Norway|Norway]], concluding on [[March 11]], 1979. Moreover, the extras hired to portray Rebel soldiers during the Battle of Hoth were local [[Wikipedia:Norwegians|Norwegians]], including several dozen mountain-rescue skiers. Filming at Elstree Studios did not begin until [[March 13]], once the Norway shots were completed. Therefore, Williams' involvement in the film does not correspond to the Allashane character.<ref name="Hoth Limited" /><ref name="Harrison Ford: The Films" /><ref name="The Making of The Empire Strikes Back - 162" />

Norwegian author and television personality [[Arve Juritzen]],<ref name="Arve Juritzen bio">{{WebCite|url=http://juritzen.no/forfattere/arve-juritzen|text=Arve Juritzen|work=[http://juritzen.no Juritzen Forlag]|language=Norwegian|archivedate=20170922191858}}</ref> who appeared in ''The Empire Strikes Back'' as a Rebel soldier extra during the Battle of Hoth scenes,<ref name="Arve Juritzen autograph 1">{{WebCite|url=http://www.let-the-wookie-win.com/index.php?showimage=379|text=My Arve Juritzen Starwars Autograph - No.(379)|author=Oldbury, Dave Louis|date=2011-06-27|work=[https://www.let-the-wookie-win.com Star Wars Autograph Collecting]|archivedate=20170922192358}}</ref><ref name="Arve Juritzen autograph 2">{{WebCite|url=http://www.let-the-wookie-win.com/index.php?showimage=383|text=My Arve Juritzen Starwars Autograph - No.(383)|author=Oldbury, Dave Louis|date=2011-06-27|work=[https://www.let-the-wookie-win.com Star Wars Autograph Collecting]|archivedate=20170922192547}}</ref> has previously autographed the Jess Allashane ''SW''CCG card for fans, suggesting that he, in fact, portrays the character in the card's picture.<ref name="Arve Juritzen autograph 3">{{WebCite|url=http://www.let-the-wookie-win.com/index.php?showimage=378|text=My Arve Juritzen Starwars Autograph - No.(378)|author=Oldbury, Dave Louis|date=2011-06-27|work=[https://www.let-the-wookie-win.com Star Wars Autograph Collecting]|archivedate=20170922192751}}</ref><ref name="Arve Juritzen autograph 4">{{WebCite|url=http://www.starwarsautographcollecting.com/Autographs/StarWarsTrilogy/ESB/ArveJuritzen.htm|text=Trilogy Autographs|work=[http://www.starwarsautographcollecting.com Dahoov's Autograph Collecting]|archivedate=20170922192845}}</ref>
